name: python3-cx-oracle
title: python3-cx-oracle
description:
Python interface to Oracle Database (Python 3)
cx_Oracle is a Python extension module that enables access to Oracle
Database.
.
It conforms to the Python database API 2.0 specification with a considerable
number of additions and a couple of exclusions.
.
You can use cx_Oracle with Oracle 11.2, 12, 18 and 19 client libraries.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cx-oracle because Python interface to Oracle Database (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cx-oracle as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cx-oracle with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cx-oracle --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
